screenSummary: The NodeBench AI interface demonstrates a sophisticated aesthetic but suffers from micro-level inconsistencies in typography, date/time formatting, and technical jargon. While the layout is generally clean, the 'earned complexity' principle is occasionally violated by unlabeled metrics and engineering-centric terminology that may alienate non-technical users.

issues.header: P2 Floating action button overlaps interactive elements
issues.details: The blue floating action button (FAB) in the bottom right corner overlaps the 'View all' link and the first item in the 'SOURCES FOR TODAY' list, obstructing user interaction with those elements.

issues.header: P3 Low contrast text in Pulse sidebar
issues.details: The labels 'Synthesis', 'Briefing', and 'Signals' in the right sidebar's Pulse section have extremely low contrast against the background, making them nearly invisible and difficult to read.

issues.header: P3 Overlapping labels in sidebar chart
issues.details: In the 'VS. REL...' line chart at the top of the right sidebar, multiple data point labels (e.g., 'HKUDS/ClawWork', 'Zaneham/BarraCUDA') overlap each other and the chart lines, significantly reducing legibility.

issues.header: P2 Overlapping and truncated labels in Pulse chart
issues.details: In the 'VS. REL...' chart within the right sidebar, multiple data point labels (e.g., 'HKUDS/ClawWork' and 'Zaneham/BarraCUDA') overlap, and others like 'ShinMegamiB' are truncated, making the chart data illegible.

issues.header: P2 Inconsistent progress indicators in AI Capabilities section
issues.details: The 'AI Capabilities' metrics (Reasoning, Uptime, Safety) display a value of '100%', but the visual progress bars show the indicator dots at the 0% position, creating a visual mismatch.

issues.header: P2 Visual elements in the right sidebar disappear after interaction
issues.details: After interacting with the search bar or sidebar menu items, several visual elements in the right sidebar fail to render correctly. Specifically, the connecting lines in the 'VS. REL...' graph, the progress bars under 'AI Capabilities' (Reasoning, Uptime, Safety), and the decorative dotted lines in the 'Pulse' section disappear, leaving only text and data points.

issues.header: P2 Navigation failure on tab click
issues.details: Clicking the 'Documents' tab does not update the active tab state or change the view content; the 'Agents' tab remains highlighted and the AI Assistants dashboard is still displayed.

issues.header: P2 Interactive overlays (dropdowns/menus) fail to render
issues.details: Interactions intended to open the model selector dropdown and the agent 'more actions' chevron menu do not result in any visible popovers or menus appearing on the screen.

issues.header: P2 Content disappearance on accordion expansion
issues.details: Expanding the 'Autonomous Operations' accordion causes the 'Available Agents' section (visible when collapsed) to completely disappear from the layout. Since there is no scrollbar, this content becomes inaccessible.

issues.header: P2 [Calendar tab not responding]
issues.details: After clicking the 'Calendar' tab in the main workspace navigation, the UI fails to update the active tab state or switch the content view. The 'Documents' tab remains visually active and the 'My Documents' header and content are still displayed instead of a calendar view.

screenSummary: The interface demonstrates a sophisticated aesthetic with a strong command of dark mode and data visualization. However, it suffers from significant accessibility issues regarding text contrast on mobile, inconsistent capitalization patterns across dashboards, and minor alignment errors in sidebar components that detract from the 'Jony Ive' school of precision.

issues.header: P2 [Tab navigation unresponsive]
issues.details: After interacting with the 'Signals' tab, the UI fails to update the active tab state and the main content area continues to display 'Today's Briefing' instead of signals-related data.

issues.header: P2 [Main content area is blank]
issues.details: The central content area is completely empty on the 'research-deals' route after interacting with the search bar, indicating a failure to render content or a missing empty state message.

issues.header: P2 Overlapping labels in data visualization
issues.details: In the top-right sidebar graph, multiple data point labels (e.g., 'Conway-Research/au...', 'HKUDS/ClawWork', 'Zaneham/BarraCUDA') overlap each other, making the text illegible.

issues.header: P3 Rendering artifacts in AI Capabilities section
issues.details: The progress indicators under the 'Reasoning', 'Uptime', and 'Safety' labels are rendered as extremely thin, fragmented lines that look like graphical artifacts rather than intentional UI elements.

issues.header: P2 Right sidebar content becomes illegible after interactions
issues.details: After performing interactions such as clicking the profile menu or switching tabs, the text labels and data visualizations in the right-hand sidebar (Pulse, AI Capabilities) disappear or lose their styling, rendering the information invisible. Only faint outlines and icons remain.

issues.header: P3 Interactive elements fail to trigger UI updates or active states
issues.details: Clicking on the 'Signals' tab, 'Saved Reports' dropdown, or the user profile menu does not result in any visual state change or the appearance of expected menus/popovers. For example, the 'Overview' tab remains visually active even after clicking the 'Signals' tab.

issues.header: P2 [Empty main content area]
issues.details: The central content area under the 'Overview' tab is completely blank, showing no data or empty state message, while the right sidebar 'Pulse' section is populated. This suggests a rendering failure for the main dashboard content.

issues.header: P3 [Conflicting active states in sidebar navigation]
issues.details: Multiple navigation items in the sidebar appear with a highlighted background simultaneously (e.g., 'My Workspace' and 'For You' in one view, 'Usage & Costs' and 'For You' in another). This creates visual ambiguity about which section is currently active.

issues.header: P2 Interactive elements fail to trigger menus or visual feedback
issues.details: The 'Filters' button, 'Saved Reports' sidebar item, User Profile icon, and 'Create New' FAB do not show any visual change, active states, or expected popover/menus after the recorded interactions. All 'After' state screenshots are identical to the initial state, indicating a lack of responsiveness.

issues.header: P2 Layout shift during Research Hub page load
issues.details: [00:05] The main content area (Daily Summary and Timeline) undergoes a significant layout shift when the 'Pulse' sidebar loads asynchronously on the right side of the page. The content initially renders in a wider state and then abruptly resizes and shifts left to accommodate the sidebar, causing a jarring visual jump. This is observed multiple times (e.g., 01:05, 01:13).
